title: High Protein Snacks
description: The best high-protein snacks for satiety, energy, and recovery — honest reviews of bars, yogurts, and packaged staples that actually deliver protein per calorie.
intro: Protein is the single biggest lever for satiety per calorie. We test packaged snacks against the question that actually matters: how much protein do you get per calorie, and what tradeoffs come with it? Below, we break down the best (and worst) protein bars, dairy snacks, and grab-and-go options.

sections.title: Best Protein Bars
sections.description: Dedicated protein bars reviewed for protein-per-calorie, ingredient quality, and what they really deliver.

sections.title: Granola Bars With Decent Protein
sections.description: Granola bars sit lower on the protein curve than dedicated protein bars, but a few are worth knowing.

sections.title: Protein-Forward Yogurts & Dairy Snacks
sections.description: Cup-style yogurts and dairy products reviewed against their candy-bar shadow versions.
